summary: A mixed‑quality show with occasional great moments, but uneven vocals and overall recording make it only fair.
review: The performance delivers some delightful highlights, yet vocal slip‑ups and a few musical missteps keep it from staying 'on' throughout. Listeners will find the set enjoyable in parts, but the inconsistency prevents it from ranking among the stronger recordings.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; comments note both positives and negatives, leading to an average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific technical details provided; reviewer mentions overall inconsistency but no clear issues with clarity or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer feels the concert is uneven, with good moments interspersed with vocal and musical lapses, preventing a consistently strong flow.
